summary: project create always sends required description; clips get accepts a positional id; read-cache writes no longer warn on no-id single-object responses; captcha solve budget raised to 180s with a clear approve-Chrome-access message.
reason: Real generate->poll->WAV dogfood surfaced: (1) POST /api/project 422s without a description field; (2) 'clips get' required --ids while every other clip/project command takes a positional id; (3) 'clips wav-url' printed a spurious 'items skipped (no extractable ID field)' warning because the best-effort write-through read cache upserts a {wav_file_url} object with no id; (4) the hCaptcha solver's 90s budget could expire while the user approved the macOS Chrome-private-storage prompt, surfacing only 'context deadline exceeded'.
